title: Recovery eye
description: Replacing recovery compass with a sculk like recovery eye
body:
🧭 This Resource Pack changes _recovery compass_ and making it more **alive!**


![eye](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/31e3d2de07e7284609b1735d2f340d6b5debdce4.png)

# 
**Changes:**
- 🎨 New texture
- ⚙️ Item name
# 

🌌 **Recovery eye** is a lost _warden eye_... craft it and it will show you place where you _died_
